meaning: Three special letters: Alif, Lam, Ra (opening of Surah)
and give good news! (command to one person)
those who (plural, referring to believers in this ayah)
a clear one/one who makes very clear
who, which, that - used to describe something that was just mentioned
then (connects this part about Allah rising above the throne to the previous part about creation)
your (all of you) Lord and Nurturer
truly/certainly (describing how Allah's promise is real)
indeed he/it (referring to Allah's promise mentioned before)
so that he may give what is deserved
because of what, due to what
he (the one who made the sun and moon)
and He determined it precisely (referring to the moon's phases)
phases (of the moon that Allah set)
so that you all may know
that (pointing to what was mentioned before)
with/by the truth (describing how Allah created this)
and the earth (in relation to Allah's signs)
they are consciously protecting themselves (from wrong)
our signs/miracles/verses (that people are heedless of)
those who are heedless (3+ males, subject)
their prayer/call (referring to the people of Paradise)
he makes something happen very quickly
those who (referring to the disbelievers mentioned in context)
he called upon us (when affliction touched him)
for the ones who exceed limits
and not (they were not going to believe)
like that (referring to how We destroyed previous nations)
it (our clear signs) is being recited (to them)
upon them (referring to those who don't hope for meeting Us)
he said (responding to those who don't believe in meeting Allah)
they hope/expect (referring to the disbelievers who don't hope for meeting Allah)
change it! (as a strong command to change the Quran)
I change/replace it (referring to the Quran mentioned earlier)
from (showing that changing the Quran would come from the Prophet's own self)
I recited it (referring to the Quran)
you (all) use intellect (addressing the disbelievers who should reflect on the Prophet's life)
and they say (about their false gods)
our helpers who speak for us
Do you (all) inform (Allah about something He doesn't know)
Allah (as the object being informed about)
and He is exalted (above what they associate with Him)
they join/associate (others with Allah in worship)
so they disagreed (after being one united community)
and if not for (connects to previous statement)
surely it would have been judged
in it (referring to what they disagree about)
and they say (about the lack of a sign from Allah)
the people (being given mercy by Allah)
when (introduces the condition of being in ships)
with/by them (referring to the people on the ships)
with/by a wind (describing how they traveled)
it came to it (wind came to the ship)
from (showing where the waves came from)
Allah (as the one being called upon)
those who are making (something) pure sincerely (calling upon Allah in this ayah)
you saved us (referring to the supplication to Allah in the ayah)
the people (as the one being addressed)
then (connecting what happened after Allah saved them)
and then we will tell you all important news
with it (referring to the water that mixed with plants)
its beauty/decoration (being taken by the earth)
and she made herself beautiful or adorned herself
they think deeply (about the signs of Allah mentioned in this ayah)
with its like (meaning: with a similar evil deed)
as if, just as (describing how their faces were covered)
all together (describing how something is done)
your (all of you) place! (what we say to them)
and so we separated completely (between them)
between them (referring to the false gods and their worshippers)
you (all) worship (addressing the polytheists in this ayah)
whatever, that which (with emphasis and lengthened pronunciation)
he possesses/controls (the hearing in this ayah)
Allah (the one true God who will say this in response)
So will you not...? (following from previous statement)
so that for all of you
your Lord (referring to Allah as the true Lord in this ayah)
you (all) are being turned away (from the truth)
you (all) judge/decide (in this ayah, asking how you make your judgment)
and yet/but still/however (connecting to previous statement about Quran not being fabricated)
of the deity, of the god
with what (they denied without having full knowledge of it)
and when not yet, and while not
before them (referring to those who denied in the past)
in/with/by him/it (referring back to what was mentioned before)
with the people who spoil or damage things
your (plural) deed/action (in contrast to the Prophet's deed mentioned earlier)
ones who are free from/innocent of (referring to multiple people)
and from them (those who listen to you)
they see (referring to those who look at you)
and but indeed (connects contrasting statement to previous ayah)
they recognize one another (referring to the people being gathered on that Day)
between them (referring to those who denied meeting Allah)
we will surely take you completely
they do/perform (referring to what they do in this ayah)
they seek to delay (referring to people's inability to delay their appointed time)
during daytime (when Allah's punishment might come)
you (all) were (referring to the disbelievers being addressed in this ayah)
then (connecting what follows to what came before)
you all were (referring to those who did wrong)
you (all) earn/are earning (referring to what you used to do)
and they ask you for news/information
able to escape/overcome (lit: among those who can make [something] impossible)
Now pay attention! (used to draw attention to what follows)
Now surely! (used to draw attention to what follows)
indeed/truly (emphasizes that what follows is definitely true)
he/it (referring to Allah in this ayah)
and towards him (you all will return to)
the chests/breasts (referring to what is in people's hearts)
and by His mercy (referring to Allah's mercy)
so by that (referring to Allah's bounty and mercy)
they gather (what they are gathering is wealth/worldly things)
Allah (as the object being spoken about)
from it (referring to the Quran being recited)
except (what comes after this word is excluded from what was mentioned before)
upon you all (as witnesses over you)
and they were (who believed in the previous ayah)
Now behold! / Indeed! (used to draw attention to what follows)
for a group of people who
they hear/listen (referring to a group of people)
any proof or authority (used in this ayah to challenge those who claim Allah has a son)
my place of standing (in this ayah: referring to Nuh's position among his people)
then (connects this command to the previous one)
you (all) give me time (in context: don't wait for me)
those who/which/that (plural, refers to those who denied Our signs)
the ones who are warned (those who received warning)
then (connects this part to what came before)
their people (referring to the messengers' people)
so not (negates what comes after it in the ayah)
with it/by it (referring to what they denied before)
like that (referring to what was mentioned before)
and so they made themselves act great (arrogantly)
do you (plural) say? (Moses questioning the magicians)
Is it magic? (Musa asking about what the magicians called the truth)
in order to turn us away
for/to you two (addressing both Moses and Aaron)
for/to you both (referring to Moses and Aaron)
bring to me! (command to many people)
throw! (all of you) (command to the magicians)
they threw (referring to the magicians in the story of Moses)
Moses (the one speaking to the magicians)
and their assembly/nobles (referring to Pharaoh and his chiefs)
he tests/persecutes them (Pharaoh persecuting the believers)
and indeed/certainly (connects to previous statement about Pharaoh)
the ones who go beyond limits (those who are mentioned in this ayah as being excessive in their opposition to Musa)
O my people! (Musa calling out to his people)
you all were (addressing the people of Moses)
you all believed strongly (addressing multiple people)
put your complete trust! (command to a group)
if (introducing the condition 'if you have believed')
so they said (following what happened before)
you two (Moses and Aaron) establish places (for your people in Egypt)
houses (as the object being settled in)
our caring Master (being called out to by Musa)
Our caring master! (being called by Musa)
so that they (Pharaoh and his chiefs) make (others) lose their way (from Your path)
Our Lord (being called upon by Moses)
their wealth (referring to Pharaoh and his people)
so you two seek to be straight
Israel (the name given to Prophet Jacob and his descendants)
in transgression (describing how Pharaoh pursued them)
and in transgression (describing how Pharaoh followed)
I believed (said by Pharaoh when drowning)
that he (referring to the fact Pharaoh realized about Allah)
before (as the subject in this phrase)
so today (referring to the day of punishment)
behind you (as a sign for those who come after you)
Israel (proper name meaning 'one who strives with God')
a place that has been established
and we provided them with sustenance
on the day (when Allah will judge between them)
then if (connects this condition to what came before)
from what (that we revealed to you)
the truth (that has come to you from your Lord)
you definitely are/become (negative command: 'do not be')
those who (referring to those who denied Allah's signs)
she came to them (referring to those who reject in this ayah)
and so it gave benefit to her
and even if (connecting to previous statement)
all of you look! (commanding multiple people)
from/of (with emphasis, connecting to next word)
the people (as the main subject being addressed)
you (all) worship (addressing the disbelievers who worship other than Allah)
the polytheists (those who join partners with Allah)
then certainly you (if you do what was mentioned before)
with harm (in the ayah: if Allah touches you with harm)
and if (connects this condition to the previous statement)
then/so not (connects to previous statement about Allah touching you with harm)
one who sends back/prevents (of His favor)
The Most Forgiving One (as a Divine attribute of Allah)
The Most Merciful (one of Allah's names)
he completely lost the right path
with/by a guardian (in the ayah: I am not over you as a guardian)
